## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## 🎨 UX and Accessibility Checklist

Please confirm that your changes follow our UX and accessibility standards:

- [ ] **Accessibility**: ARIA labels added to icon-only buttons.
- [ ] **Accessibility**: Images have descriptive alt text.
- [ ] **Accessibility**: Keyboard navigation supported (correct tab order, focus states visible).
- [ ] **Accessibility**: Sufficient color contrast for text and interactive elements.
- [ ] **Interaction**: Loading states added for asynchronous operations.
- [ ] **Interaction**: Hover and active states added to interactive elements.
- [ ] **Interaction**: Destructive actions require confirmation.
- [ ] **Visual**: Consistent spacing and alignment using design system classes.
- [ ] **Verification**: Changes verified with `pnpm lint` and `pnpm test`.
